dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of KPIs, business context and pending actions for your current profile.
dashboard.pendingInvitesHint: {{count}} invited affiliate is still waiting for activation, so contributor metrics may lag slightly.

programsOverview.empty: No program is available for this account.

kpis.totalDescription: Total number of affiliates registered for this account
kpis.suspendedDescription: Affiliates suspended or inactive on referral side

agents.pendingInvitesHint: {{count}} invited affiliate is waiting for activation.

dialogs.assignedProgramsDescription: Complete list of programs currently assigned to this affiliate.
dialogs.noPrograms: This affiliate is currently not linked to any program.
dialogs.suspendDescription: This action will suspend the affiliate's access. They will not be able to log in or submit new referrals.
dialogs.reactivateDescription: This action will restore the affiliate's access to the platform.

prospects.title: Referrals
prospects.description: Submission, sync status and lifecycle of sponsored referrals.

kpis.convertedDescription: Prospects that produced validated commercial results
kpis.lostDescription: Prospects marked as lost by IACRM

dialogs.deleteDescription: This action will mark this referral as deleted. This can be undone by an administrator.
dialogs.addMethodDescription: Choose how you want to add a new referral.

programs.title: Programs
programs.description: Program lifecycle, assignments and commission rules for conversions.
programs.noResults: No program matches the current filter.

dialogs.assignAgentsDescription: Select business agents to attach to this program.
dialogs.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. Please type the program name to confirm.
dialogs.lockedAgentTooltip: This agent already submitted prospects in this program and cannot be removed.
dialogs.assignRewardPackDescriptionLong: Select an existing rewards pack from the business for this program.
dialogs.pauseDescription: Agents will not be able to add new prospects while the program is paused.
dialogs.reactivateDescription: The program will become active again and agents will regain prospect submission.
dialogs.suspendDescription: Benefits linked to this program will be blocked while it enters controlled wind-down.
dialogs.archiveDescription: The program will move to archive and leave current operations.
dialogs.deleteDescription: This action is irreversible. Type the exact program name to confirm.

availability.readOnlyHelp: Prospect submission is not enabled for this workspace.
availability.readyHelp: Open the program or submit a new prospect immediately.
availability.pausedHelp: Open the program details. Prospect submission is paused.
availability.blockedHelp: The owner is winding down this program. New prospects are blocked.
availability.unavailableHelp: This program is not open to new submissions.

cash.helper: Rule used to convert program points into euros.

businessScope.title: Business scope
businessScope.descriptionAgent: The business that owns this program and controls its rules, rewards, and assignments.
businessScope.noOtherPrograms: No other program found for this business.

info.attributionDescriptionOwner: Defines how agents earn points from commercial outcomes.
info.attributionDescriptionAgent: Shows how this program grants points for your activity.
info.pointsDescriptionOwner: Current point rate used by this program.
info.pointsDescriptionAgent: Current point value for this program.
info.exchangeDescriptionAgent: Shows whether this program offers cash, rewards, or both.
info.cashDescriptionAgent: Conversion rate used when cash exchange is available.
info.rewardsDescriptionOwner: Reward catalog linked to this program and associated point costs.
info.rewardsDescriptionAgent: Reward items available through this program and the points required for each.
info.assignmentsDescriptionOwner: Agents currently linked to this program.

card.revenueTierNotice: Revenue-tier programs remain paused until tier rules are configured.
card.suspensionNotice: Suspended: controlled wind-down mode. New prospects are blocked. You can lift the suspension to return to active, or archive the program after the deadline.

tooltip.editArchived: Archived program. Use a non-archived program to edit general settings.
tooltip.editAssigned: Agents are already assigned. Remove active assignments before editing general settings.
tooltip.editFallback: Prospects already exist or the program.update permission is missing.
tooltip.cashNoMode: Cash mode is inactive. Switch this program to cash or both to edit this section.
tooltip.cashArchived: Archived program. Use a non-archived program to edit cash rules.
tooltip.cashAssigned: Agents are already assigned. Remove active assignments before editing cash rules.
tooltip.rewardsNoMode: Rewards mode is inactive. Switch this program to reward or both to edit the pack.
tooltip.rewardsArchived: Archived program. Use a non-archived program to edit the rewards pack.
tooltip.activateNotDraft: Only a draft program can be activated.
tooltip.activateFallback: Complete the draft configuration and ensure you have program.update.
tooltip.liftNotSuspended: Lift suspension is only available for a suspended program.
tooltip.pausePending: Another operation is already in progress.
tooltip.pauseRevenueTier: Revenue-tier programs cannot be reactivated until tier logic is finalized.
tooltip.pauseFallback: Pausing requires an active program and the program.pause permission.
tooltip.suspendInvalidStatus: Suspension is allowed only for an active or paused program.
tooltip.suspendOpenProspects: There are still open prospects. Close them before suspending.
tooltip.archiveInvalidStatus: Archiving is possible only after the program has been suspended.
tooltip.archiveNoDeadline: Suspension end date is missing. Re-suspend the program to recreate the waiting period.
tooltip.archiveFallback: The suspension waiting period is not over or program.pause is missing.
tooltip.assignBlocked: Assignment is blocked while the program is suspended or archived.
tooltip.deleteArchived: Missing program.update permission to delete this archived program.
tooltip.deleteAssigned: Active assignments exist. Archive the program first or remove allowed assignments.
tooltip.deleteFallback: Deletion is allowed only for an archived program, or one without active assignments and prospects.
tooltip.prospectInactive: The program is not active. Reactivate it before adding prospects.
tooltip.prospectFallback: Action temporarily unavailable. Refresh and try again.

detail.missingId: Program identifier is missing from the current route.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: Converted transactions, point attribution and commercial results from CRM.

empty.title: No transaction matches the filters.
empty.hint: Adjust the period, status, or program/affiliate scope to find an existing transaction.

overview.title: Transaction view
overview.description: Reference, product and financial data useful for business reading.

context.title: Commercial context
context.description: Program, referring affiliate and prospect attached to the transaction.
context.noProspect: This transaction is not linked to any local prospect.

sync.title: Synchronization
sync.description: Quick read of synchronization and reconciliation markers.

audit.title: Audit trail
audit.description: Recorded steps on the transaction, sorted from newest to oldest.
audit.empty: No timestamped event is available for this transaction yet.

recognized.detail: The transaction was recognized and reconciled to the commercial flow.

validated.detail: The amount was validated and can feed the points calculation.

rejected.detail: The transaction was rejected before final validation.

paid.detail: The commercial payment was recorded as paid.

points.title: Points & Wallet
points.description: History of your points, accumulations, and eligibility for various rewards.

availableBalance.title: Available balance
availableBalance.help: Available balance formula: sum of ledger entries with status = available. Pending releases, exchange reservations, consumed and reversed items are excluded.

pendingRelease.title: Pending release
pendingRelease.help: Sum of pending points. Not usable at the moment.

reservedExchange.title: Reserved for exchange
reservedExchange.help: Amount currently blocked from the available wallet (status = reserved).

projected.title: Projected points
projected.help: Projection formula: sum of estimated points for each open prospect, via the program rule.

wallet.empty: No wallet is available for the current selection.

description.accrualPending: Projected points awaiting validation. Not spendable.

payouts.title: Requests
payouts.description: Consultation and processing of point exchange requests for gifts or transfers.

exchangePacks.title: Point Packs
exchangePacks.description: Management and consultation of available reward packs for exchange.
exchangePacks.searchPlaceholder: Search for a pack or gift...
exchangePacks.empty: No pack matches the current search.

card.noActiveGifts: No active gifts. Add at least one gift before using this pack in a program.

dialog.programsDescription: Complete list of programs linked to {{name}}.

dialog.updatedDescription: Last update recorded on this pack.

tooltip.disableBlockedByPrograms: Cannot deactivate this pack while it is used by a program.
tooltip.disableBlockedPermission: You do not have permission to deactivate this pack.
tooltip.deleteBlockedByPrograms: Cannot delete this pack while it is used by a program.
tooltip.deleteBlockedPermission: You do not have permission to delete this pack.

detail.noProgramsUsingPack: No program is using this pack yet.
detail.noGiftsHint: This pack can exist empty, but it cannot be assigned to a rewards program.

detail.draftAlertDescription: Save to keep your changes. Reordering alone does not notify affiliates.
detail.notAssignableDescription: Add at least one active gift before using this pack in a rewards program.

form.description: Configure the name and description of the gift catalog.

form.createInfo: You will be able to add gifts after the pack is created.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe when to use this pack and the benefits it contains.

item.description: Each gift defines a benefit and its cost in points.
item.infoDescription: This gift will be visible in programs that use this pack.

deletePack.title: Delete pack
deletePack.blockedDescription_one: This pack is linked to {{count}} program. Remove it from programs before deleting.
deletePack.blockedDescription_other: This pack is linked to {{count}} programs. Remove it from programs before deleting.
deletePack.irreversibleDescription: The pack and its gifts will be removed from active configuration.

deleteItem.title: Delete gift
deleteItem.notifyDescription_one: This pack is used by {{count}} program. Assigned agents will receive a notification after deletion.
deleteItem.notifyDescription_other: This pack is used by {{count}} programs. Assigned agents will receive a notification after deletion.
deleteItem.removeDescription: The gift will no longer be available in this pack.

notifications.dialogDescription: These preferences are currently saved locally in this browser for the main frontend.

security.recoveryEmailDescription: Email address used for account recovery

details.lastActivity: Last activity detected on the secure shell.

sync.noVisibility: You don't have permission to view sync status.

name.title: Change display name
name.description: Update the name displayed across the application.

avatar.title: Change profile photo
avatar.description: Upload a source image. The browser compresses it before the backend writes it to Cloudflare R2.
avatar.acceptedFormats: JPG, PNG, and WebP are accepted. Final storage format is 512×512 WebP.

logo.title: Change business logo
logo.description: Upload a source image. The browser compresses it before the backend writes it to Cloudflare R2.
logo.acceptedFormats: JPG, PNG, and WebP are accepted. Final storage format is 512×512 WebP.

email.title: Change account email
email.description: The system sends both a signed verification link and a 6-digit code so the user can choose the faster path.
email.newEmailHint: Submitting this form does not replace the active account email immediately. It creates a pending email until verification succeeds.
email.pendingMessage: {{email}} is waiting for verification. Use the signed inbox link or enter the 6-digit code before {{expiry}}.

business.title: Edit business identity
business.description: Group contact and public-facing fields into one focused edit flow.
business.invalidEmailError: Please enter a valid email address for the business contact.

syncIssues.title: CRM sync incidents
syncIssues.description: Quick overview of the current failure state and the latest incident reported by the backend.
syncIssues.noFailureDetails: No failure details are currently available.

password.title: Change password
password.description: Confirm the current password before replacing it with a new one.

toasts.emailVerificationSent: Verification email sent. A link and a 6-digit code have been sent.
toasts.emailVerified: The new email has been verified and activated.

api.title: Integration control · CRM
api.noChangesWithKey: The current key is already saved. Change the key or sync mode to save.
api.noKeyWarning: This configuration must contain a valid API key. Without a key, business forms may open but direct calls to the IACRM simulator will remain blocked.

toasts.keyRemovedBusiness: API key removed from form. Save to apply the deletion to the backend.
toasts.keyRemovedLocal: API key removed locally from the form.
toasts.draftResetBackend: Local draft reset from backend configuration.

iacrm.title: IACRM
iacrm.description: IACRM integration dashboard showing services, clients, pipeline, and invoicing from the external CRM system.
iacrm.notConfigured: IACRM is required to run the application.

clients.error: Failed to load clients from IACRM. Check the API configuration in Settings.
clients.empty: No clients were found in IACRM.

services.error: Failed to load services from IACRM. Check the API configuration in Settings.
services.empty: No services were found in IACRM.

invoices.error: Failed to load invoices from IACRM.
invoices.empty: No invoices were found in IACRM.

pipeline.prospectsHint: Use the stage dropdown on each row to move a prospect through the funnel.
pipeline.empty: No prospects are currently in the pipeline.

passwordForgot.title: Request a password reset token.
passwordForgot.description: Enter your account email. If the user exists, a reset token will be generated for the password replacement step.

forbidden.title: This route is outside the current permission scope.
forbidden.description: The frontend hid what it could, but the final route decision still respects the backend permission contract.

notFound.title: The requested page is not part of the current app surface.
notFound.description: Use the authenticated navigation or return to the login screen to restart the flow cleanly.

sessionExpired.title: The workspace session is no longer valid.
sessionExpired.description: Re-authenticate to rebuild the current user, permission payload, and active business context.

modulePlaceholder.scopeDescription: This screen is already protected by the live permission payload from the backend.
modulePlaceholder.integrationDescription: This module is intentionally present before its business API lands, so later integrations can attach to a stable route, shell, and permission contract.

focus.connectEndpoints: Connect the route to its backend list and detail endpoints.
focus.states: Apply loading, empty, and error states from the canonical screen spec.
focus.permissions: Keep action-level controls disabled or hidden from the resolved permission payload.

empty.agentCanCreate: No requests match the current filters. Start a new exchange when you are ready.
empty.agentCannotCreate: No requests match the current filters.
empty.owner: No exchange requests match the current queue filters.

dialog.title: New exchange request
dialog.description: Build your request step by step from the program balance you want to use.
dialog.selectProgramHint: Start from the program balance you want to use for this request.
dialog.noPrograms: No program currently has points ready for an exchange request.
dialog.rewardDescription: Exchange points for a catalog reward.
dialog.cashDescription: Convert points into a cash request.
dialog.noExchangeOptions: This program has no active exchange option available right now.
dialog.exceedsBalance: This request exceeds the selected program balance. You can use up to {{max}} pts.

errors.pointsPositive: The points amount must be greater than zero.
errors.pointsExceed: You can only request up to {{max}} pts on this program.

overview.title: Exchange overview
overview.description: Request value, lifecycle dates, and submission context.

commercial.title: Commercial context
commercial.description: Program, affiliate, and validation context around this exchange.

timeline.title: Fulfillment timeline
timeline.description: Lifecycle milestones recorded for this exchange request.
timeline.empty: No lifecycle event has been recorded yet.

ledger.title: Ledger impact
ledger.description: Immutable points entries generated by this exchange request.
ledger.empty: No ledger impact has been recorded for this request yet.

catalog.title: Reward catalog snapshot
catalog.description: Pack items visible in the linked program at the time of review.

requested.detail: The exchange request was submitted and entered the queue.

approved.detail: The request was approved and points were locked for fulfillment.

processing.detail: Fulfillment started for this exchange request.

completed.detail: The request was completed and the points were consumed.

rejected.detail: The request was rejected before fulfillment.

cancelled.detail: The request was cancelled and any held points were released.
